purpose: Source files to load into a future custom GPT/project knowledge base
status: Web/App integration completed with Mini Support Desk product. web serves frontend and proxies /api/* to app:8080. app runs support-desk-api with tickets.json, product logs and manual /metrics. Loki/Grafana sees support-desk-api product logs. Future improvements centralized in 12_future_improvements_backlog.md.
last_completed_stage: Web/App integration: Mini Support Desk frontend on web, support-desk-api backend on app, Nginx reverse proxy /api/* -> app:8080, Browser -> web -> app flow verified, product logs visible in Loki/Grafana
current_next_stage: Logging polish: finalize support-desk-api product logs, update Loki/LogQL display for event logs, handle X-Forwarded-For/original client IP and status unchanged behavior. Roadmap keeps stages 1-12 plus optional Telegram bot.
progress_estimate: engineering readiness 92-94%; demo readiness 90-92%; 8/12 main roadmap stages completed
